text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, sorry! Just working on some squats.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I slept great last night, so today I'm loaded with
energy!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I can't sit still! Gotta pour all this energy...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Agh, I just can't stop! If you'll excuse me, I gotta
keep goin'!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Ryan is brimming with power!
